title: Celestial
content:
Celestials
 are a race of people from the 
Immortal Astral Continent
 who are affiliated with the 
Celestial Ancestor's

Celestial Clan
.

The only Celestials in the Cave World are those that came from the 
Immortal Astral Continent
 such as 
Lian Daofei
, 
Master Scarlet Soul
, 
Sovereign
 and the 
Seven-Colored Sect
's members; those of the 
Ancient Celestial Realm
 such as 
Lord of the Sealed Realm
, 
Bai Fan
, 
Zi Xia
; or those that obtained Celestial Blood inheritances such as 
Wang Lin
 and 
Old Ghost Zhan
.

All those who called themselves "Celestials" inside the Cave World such as the cultivators of the 
Allheaven Star System
 during the 108 Celestial Bestowment or cultivators that ascended to the four Celestial Realms during the time of the 
Celestial Domain
 are not true Celestials as they do not contain the bloodline of the 
Immortal Astral Continent
. Instead, it was merely a title used to describe those who followed a specific path of cultivation that aided those in the Sealed Realm in breaking into the Third Step.
